description_long: This object depicts a suburban residential block featuring four distinct houses arranged along intersecting streets, surrounded by trees, lawns, and driveways. Each house has a unique architectural design, with pitched roofs, multiple windows, and attached or detached garages. The landscaping includes a mix of deciduous and evergreen trees, as well as manicured lawns and paved walkways. The houses are separated by fences and hedges, providing privacy and clear property boundaries. One property features a backyard pool, while others have patios or porches. The streets are wide and bordered by sidewalks, creating a typical neighborhood environment.
description: A suburban neighborhood block with four distinct houses, landscaped yards, driveways, and intersecting streets.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the L-shaped street layout with three houses prominently visible, each with driveways, lawns, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear sides of the houses, revealing backyard features such as a pool and patios, as well as the arrangement of trees along the street.
description_view_2: View 2 presents a frontal perspective of the central house with a pool, and a clear view of the street and sidewalk in front of the properties.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the backyards and fences, with the houses' rear facades and a more enclosed, private aspect of the properties.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of standard and large windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature covered porches, steps, and prominent front doors, some with columns or overhangs.
